author: Andrei Lobanov
description: Edit GEDCOM files with autocomplete, validation, navigation, and semantic highlighting. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

name: Domorium GEDCOM Editor

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Fix Obsidian quality warnings and add release provenance by @lavich in https://github.com/lavich/domorium-obsidian/pull/8
* chore(deps): bump @codemirror/language from 6.11.3 to 6.12.4 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/lavich/domorium-obsidian/pull/2
* chore(deps): bump @codemirror/commands from 6.8.1 to 6.10.4 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/lavich/domorium-obsidian/pull/5
* chore(deps-dev): bump esbuild from 0.25.12 to 0.28.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/lavich/domorium-obsidian/pull/6
* chore(deps-dev): bump vite from 7.3.6 to 8.1.5 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/lavich/domorium-obsidian/pull/4

## New Contributors
* @dependabot[bot] made their first contribution in https://github.com/lavich/domorium-obsidian/pull/2

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/lavich/domorium-obsidian/compare/0.1.0...0.1.1
releases.name: Domorium for Obsidian 0.1.1
